problem.statement: Replace this statement with the verified user or operational problem to solve.
problem.currentWorkaround: Describe the current workaround or state that exists before implementation.

actors.role: Replace with a real actor role
forbiddenActions: Must not receive actions belonging to another role

surfaces.exclusionReason: Template only; select and justify every real required or excluded surface.

outcome.statement: Replace with the observable actor or business outcome expected from the capability.

criteria: Replace with a measurable functional acceptance criterion
failureStates: The capability appears on the wrong surface or for the wrong actor

business: The capability must preserve its declared domain ownership
negative: An excluded actor or surface must not receive the capability
